name: Embroker Digital Business Insurance API
what_it_does: Embroker digital business insurance REST API for technology companies, startups, and law firms to get real-time quotes, bind policies, and manage commercial insurance including Directors & Officers (D&O), Technology E&O, Cyber, EPL, and umbrella coverage through Embroker's digital brokerage platform, with emphasis on VC-backed startup insurance bundles and tech professional liability. Enables AI agents to manage commercial insurance quoting for startup coverage automation, handle D&O policy binding for board liability automation, access cyber insurance enrollment for technology company risk automation, retrieve policy management for commercial insurance portfolio automation, manage certificate of insurance for vendor and customer compliance automation, handle endorsement and coverage change for policy modification automation, access claims reporting for incident management automation, retrieve renewal management for annual policy lifecycle automation, manage risk assessment for underwriting data automation, and integrate Embroker with VC portfolio platforms, law firm management, and startup operations for end-to-end commercial insurance automation.
use_cases: Getting real-time D&O and tech E&O quotes for VC-backed startups from insurance automation agents
Binding cyber insurance for technology companies from risk management platform agents
Managing certificate of insurance issuance for vendor compliance from procurement agents
Automating annual policy renewal for startup insurance portfolio management agents
not_for: Personal/consumer insurance (Embroker is commercial business insurance only)
Construction, manufacturing, or industrial risk (Embroker focuses on tech/professional lines)
On-demand per-job coverage (use Thimble for gig/hourly insurance)
best_when: A VC platform, startup accelerator, or tech company wanting AI agents to automate D&O, cyber, and professional liability insurance procurement and management through Embroker's digital commercial insurance platform.
avoid_when: UNDERWRITING REQUIRES COMPANY DATA: Embroker D&O/cyber quotes require detailed company information (revenue, headcount, funding stage, industry); automated quote must collect complete application data; automated sparse-data quote creates declined or mispriced coverage. PARTNER API IS NOT SELF-SERVE: Embroker partner API access requires business development agreement; automated standalone integration without partnership creates no API access; automated self-service API key assumption creates unauthorized access. POLICY BINDING REQUIRES BROKER REVIEW FOR COMPLEX RISKS: Embroker complex placements (D&O above thresholds, umbrella) may require broker touchpoint; automated instant bind assumption for all coverages creates manual review queue delay. CERTIFICATES ARE ENTITY-SPECIFIC: Embroker certificates of insurance must be issued per requesting entity (additional insured); automated blanket COI generation without requestor entity creates invalid certificate.

auth.notes: Embroker uses OAuth 2.0 for partner API authentication. REST API with JSON. San Francisco, CA HQ. Founded 2015 by Matt Miller. Backed by Canaan Partners, ACME Capital ($163M raised). Products: D&O, Tech E&O, Cyber, EPL, umbrella, startup bundle. SDKs: None public. Licensed surplus lines broker. AM Best-rated carriers. Startup insurance specialist. Competes with Hiscox and Coalition for tech/startup commercial lines.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Sandbox for partners; production requires Embroker partnership
pricing.paid_tiers: Broker commission model; premiums vary by coverage: D&O from $1,500/year, cyber from $1,000/year, startup bundle pricing
pricing.notes: San Francisco CA. Canaan/ACME backed. Commission-based broker. Partnership required for API.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; quote and bind APIs throttled; webhooks for policy and renewal events

known_agent_gotchas: FULL COMPANY PROFILE REQUIRED FOR QUOTE: Embroker D&O/cyber underwriting requires complete company profile (revenue, headcount, funding, industry SIC); automated quote with partial data creates incomplete_application error or broad coverage exclusions

PARTNER API REQUIRES FORMAL AGREEMENT: Embroker partner API is not publicly self-service; automated integration without partnership agreement creates no API access; automated developer portal key assumption creates unauthorized_client error

COVERAGE TIERS HAVE MINIMUM PREMIUMS: Embroker coverage has minimum annual premiums per line; automated small-company bind below minimum creates rejection; automated micro-startup bind assumption creates coverage floor rejection

COI ADDITIONAL INSURED SPECIFICATION: Embroker certificate of insurance requires specifying additional insured entity; automated blanket COI without named additional insured creates invalid certificate rejected by requesting entity
RENEWAL WORKFLOW HAS ADVANCE NOTICE: Embroker renewals initiated 60-90 days before expiry; automated renewal must trigger in advance window; automated last-minute renewal creates lapsed coverage gap
agent_readiness.security_notes: Digital commercial insurance broker. US state-licensed. OAuth2. US. Company financial and risk data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Commercial insurtech broker. US DOI/surplus lines regulated. OAuth2. US. Company financial and policy data.
